creator: mmokhi@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Steven Hartland from comment #10)
Aha.
I thought your problem is the first part.

Now it makes sense more. :)

Still i prefer we keep/merge this part in your suggestion too:
"Please merge your existing my.cnf with the new default and move"
"it to \"%%ETCDIR%%/my.cnf\"."
Specially its wording.
It encourages people to use new default instead of workaround :)

Do you agree?
